title: salix lasiolepis var. bakeri
intro: Salix lasiolepis var. bakeri, also known as the Bakers willow or Santa Cruz willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Salix lasiolepis var. bakeri include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the bark or leaves in hot water.
